narrative:
Bucyrus Township has 597 registered voters, with 45.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.8 percentage points.
